summary: DuckDuckGo Vercel AI SDK: EventStream 3 events 정상 파싱! 하지만 UI는 여전히 generic error. wide event 중복 전송 경고 발생.

services.template_used: duckduckgo_sse (Vercel AI SDK Data Stream Protocol)

eventstream_detail.data: 0:"⚠ 이 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습..." (text-delta)

results.response_body: Nothing to preview - This request has no response data available
results.ui_message: 이런... Duck.ai를 일시적으로 사용할 수 없습니다. 잠시 후 다시 시도하세요.
results.console_warning: Attempted to send a wide event that has already been sent duck-chat-session complete (entry.duckai.e7afac0...js:2)

root_cause_analysis.sse_format: CORRECT — Vercel AI SDK format (0:text, d:finish, [DONE]) produces 3 EventStream events
root_cause_analysis.chrome_devtools_parsing: SUCCESS — Chrome EventStream tab correctly parses all 3 events
root_cause_analysis.app_js_parsing: FAILURE — DuckDuckGo frontend still shows generic error despite correct SSE format
root_cause_analysis.wide_event_clue: duck-chat-session complete event sent twice — suggests session lifecycle anomaly
root_cause_analysis.h2_non_streaming: APF sends entire SSE body as single completed H2 DATA frame with END_STREAM. Chrome DevTools can parse it retrospectively, but the app's fetch() ReadableStream reader receives all data at once instead of incremental chunks. This breaks the streaming assumption of eventsource-parser.
root_cause_analysis.comparison_with_418: #418 duckduckgo_json had 0 EventStream events. #419 duckduckgo_sse has 3 events — format is correct but delivery mechanism (non-streaming H2) is the blocker

overall_verdict: BLOCK_CONFIRMED_BUT_WARNING_FAILED — Vercel AI SDK format is CORRECT (3 events parsed) but non-streaming H2 delivery prevents frontend JS from processing the stream
key_findings: BREAKTHROUGH: Vercel AI SDK format produces 3 EventStream events (vs 0 with old formats for DeepSeek)
SSE body format is no longer the problem — the H2 non-streaming delivery is the sole remaining blocker
The wide event duplicate warning suggests the session completion logic fires before stream processing completes
Response body still shows 'Nothing to preview' — consistent with H2 DATA+END_STREAM single-frame delivery
No red JS errors in Console — the generic error is from application-level error handling, not a JS crash
recommendation: APF C++ needs to implement true H2 streaming: send multiple DATA frames without END_STREAM, then final DATA frame with END_STREAM. This is the ONLY way to make browser fetch() ReadableStream deliver data incrementally to eventsource-parser.
